leadText: The Blue Flute (Japanese: あおいビードロ Blue Vidro) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation III. It is one of the flutes.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation III 1.2 Generation IV 1.3 Generation V and Pokémon X and Y 1.4 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] When used in the field or in battle, it wakes a sleeping Pokémon. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it wakes a sleeping Pokémon. The Blue Flute cannot be used outside of battle. Generation V and Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] The Blue Flute serves no practical purpose other than to be sold . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] When used in the field or in battle, it wakes a sleeping Pokémon.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Route 113 Glass Workshop (250 steps) FR LG Trade Colo XD Trade D P Pt Trade HG SS Viridian Forest B W Route 13 (treasure hunter) B2 W2 Route 13 (treasure hunter) X Y Trade OR AS Route 113 Glass Workshop (250 grams)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD A glass flute that awakens sleeping Pok é mon . FR LG A blue glass flute that awakens a sleeping Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS A blue flute made from blown glass. Its melody awakens a single Pokémon from sleep. B W B2 W2 A toy flute made from blue glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A lovely toy flute to admire. It's made from blue glass. OR AS S M US UM A flute made from blue glass that awakens sleeping Pokémon. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A flute made from blue glass. It awakens sleeping Pokémon.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generation III 1.2.2 Generation IV 1.2.3 Generation V and Pokémon X and Y 1.2.4 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS N/A $ 50 S M US UM N/A $ 10 In the Generation V games, the Blue Flute can be sold to the billionaire maniac in Undella Town for $ 7000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] When used in the field or in battle, it wakes a sleeping Pokémon. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it wakes a sleeping Pokémon. The Blue Flute cannot be used outside of battle. Generation V and Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] The Blue Flute serves no practical purpose other than to be sold .
